architecture_families.name: Compiled Declaration Architecture
architecture_families.core_question: What is the named declaration, where is the lowering seam, what stable form freezes meaning, and who owns runtime?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: inventing fake IRs for thin wrappers or utility modules

architecture_families.name: Compiler / IR Pipeline
architecture_families.core_question: What source language is parsed and what intermediate representations exist before execution or codegen?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: stopping at parse trees when downstream projections need a stronger contract

architecture_families.name: Model-Driven Architecture
architecture_families.core_question: What canonical model exists, how is it transformed, and what downstream realizations consume it?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: letting model jargon outrun actual implementation seams

architecture_families.name: Hexagonal / Ports-and-Adapters
architecture_families.core_question: What are the ports, what are the adapters, and where do dependencies point?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: assuming ports/adapters alone explain declaration or stable-form concerns

architecture_families.name: Event Causality Architecture
architecture_families.core_question: What is the canonical event contract, who emits it, who persists it, and how is replay/recovery handled?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: treating emitted events as authored declarations

architecture_families.name: Projection Architecture
architecture_families.core_question: What source of truth is being projected, and what guarantees keep projections from becoming semantic owners?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: mistaking a projection for the ontology or stable compiled form

architecture_families.name: Fractal Authoring Architecture
architecture_families.core_question: Where are the distributed roots of truth, and how do they normalize into one derived view?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: creating a second authored registry that drifts from the roots

architecture_families.name: Architecture Reconstruction
architecture_families.core_question: Given code and artifacts, what is the as-built architecture and how does it differ from the as-designed one?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: trying to reconstruct without explicit viewpoints or abstraction levels

architecture_families.name: Views and Beyond
architecture_families.core_question: What views are needed for which stakeholders, and how do those views stay coherent?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: using one view to answer every concern

architecture_families.name: ArchiMate / UAF style metamodeling
architecture_families.core_question: What layers, aspects, domains, and model kinds organize the architecture space?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: mistaking the metamodel for the implementation

architecture_families.name: KDM / architecture decompiler
architecture_families.core_question: What common intermediate model lets us reverse engineer existing systems into analyzable artifacts?
architecture_families.anti_pattern: building a giant intermediate model no one can actually query or use

problem_solving_patterns.name: First Principles Reasoning
use_for: breaking complex systems into irreducible truths
checking whether jargon is hiding confusion

problem_solving_patterns.name: Current Reality Tree
use_for: cause-effect decomposition across organizations or systems

problem_solving_patterns.name: Fermi Estimation
use_for: sanity checks for ambitious system plans
